visual_findings.finding: Model-edited face_base_clean removes baked eyes and mouth without the previous obvious local inpaint smear.
Hybrid eye filtering removes the large oval eye skin-patch boundary in clean-base assembly.
Mouth expression layers preserved from v0 keep the preferred contact-sheet shape but still carry visible skin-patch alpha in assembly QA.

decision: Do not proceed to Mini Cubism diagnostic preview with the full mouth set yet. The source/front and model-edited clean base are usable; the next repair should filter or regenerate only mouth expression alpha so mouth shapes keep their v0 look without skin patches.
